name: Mohid Ramzan
title: Flutter Developer
bio: Passionate Flutter Developer specializing in crafting high-performance, beautiful mobile and web applications with clean architecture and solid OOP principles.
about_details: I am a dedicated developer focused on building scalable cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Dart. I write clean, maintainable code leveraging Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and modern databases like MySQL and Supabase.

experience.description: Architected and shipped modular Flutter applications, reducing codebase complexity using BLoC and Clean OOP Architecture. Integrated Supabase real-time databases and MySQL queries.
Created interactive UI modules using Flutter and Dart. Collaborated with design teams to translate high-fidelity Figma mockups into responsive mobile apps.

featured_projects.title: EcoTrack Mobile App
featured_projects.description: A cross-platform Flutter application built to track carbon footprint and gamify ecological milestones. Features clean OOP layout, interactive charts, and offline-first state persistence.

featured_projects.title: ChatForge Realtime
featured_projects.description: A real-time messaging application featuring instant database sync via Supabase, message caching, and secure token authentication.

featured_projects.title: Apex Task Board
featured_projects.description: A high-performance Kanban board application for software engineering teams, featuring real-time WebSocket state management and beautiful slide transitions.

featured_projects.title: QuickShare Cloud
featured_projects.description: A secure file sharing application utilizing Supabase storage buckets and custom metadata querying via SQL.

featured_projects.title: FoodieDelivery
featured_projects.description: A clean architecture food ordering app built with state management and dynamic map integration.
